description: Capabilities for the Remudero desktop shell's main window (W3-T3, MASTER-PLAN §7 shell 1): the native affordances this shell adds over shell 0 (tray, autostart, global hotkey, notifications, deep links). No filesystem/shell/http permissions -- this window still talks to the daemon ONLY via the unmodified web build's own @remudero/api-client calls (MASTER-PLAN §7A), never a native bridge around it.
